task.desc: Add a Makefile target named evidence-dir that creates the docs/05-OPERATIONS/evidence/ directory if it does not exist

l1.content: {"edit_description":"Add 'evidence-dir' target to Makefile","target_files":["Makefile"],"patch_commands":["sed -i \"s/^#.*evidence-dir$/evidence-dir: docs/05-OPERATIONS/evidence/;\" Makefile"],"validation_commands":["grep -q 'evidence-dir' Makefile"],"expected_outcome":"Makefile now has 'evidence-dir' target that creates docs/05-OPERATIONS/evidence/ directory if missing","risk_notes":"No specific risks identified","follow_up_type":"none|needs_review"}

parsed.expected_outcome: Makefile now has 'evidence-dir' target that creates docs/05-OPERATIONS/evidence/ directory if missing
